ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., city, country) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, upper-air, radar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station collecting the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data point */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions (e.g., Clear, Cloudy) */,
  "date_utc" TEXT /* Date and time in UTC */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  "events" TEXT /* Weather events (e.g., Rain, Snow) */,
  "gust_speed" REAL /* Gust speed */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation */,
  "sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Sea level pressure */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "time_edt" TEXT /* Time in EDT */,
  "time_est" TEXT /* Time in EST */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "wind_dir_degrees" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "quality_control_flags" TEXT /* Flags indicating data quality issues (e.g., suspicious, missing) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_wind_speed FOREIGN KEY ("wind_speed") REFERENCES wind_speeds ("speed_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_events FOREIGN KEY ("events") REFERENCES events ("event_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_wind_direction FOREIGN KEY ("wind_direction") REFERENCES wind_directions ("direction_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_conditions FOREIGN KEY ("conditions") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., Clear, Cloudy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "condition_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the weather condition (e.g., SKC, BKN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event (e.g., Rain, Snow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather event */,
  "event_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the weather event (e.g., RA, SN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W, NW, NE, SW, SE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wind direction */,
  "direction_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speeds" (
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed */,
  "speed_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind speed (e.g., Calm, Light, Moderate, Strong) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wind speed */,
  "speed_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the wind speed (e.g., CL, LT, MD, ST) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, NetCDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality flag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being flagged */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date the flag was raised */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Description of the data quality issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the data quality issue (e.g., corrected, ignored) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project membership */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_memberships_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
